---
date: "2021-01-01"
title: "0. Review Biogeography and Global Ecology"
subtitle: "Revisiting pairwise correlations in environmental data, and introducing species associations"
bibliography: ../references.bib
csl: ../marine-biology.csl
format:
  html:
    code-fold: false
    toc-title: "On this page"
    standalone: true
    toc-location: right
    page-layout: full
---

::: callout-tip
## BDC334 material for review in Week 1

-   [Ecological Data](../BDC334/01-introduction.html)

-   [Environmental Distance](../BDC334/02b-env_dist.html)

-   [Quantifying and Describing Biodiversity](../BDC334/03-04-biodiversity.html)
:::
